_comment: Line caps (wc -l semantics) enforced by scripts/check-file-size.mjs. AIO-320 holds the line on scripts/aios.mjs growth; AIO-315 ratchets this down per extraction PR. 2026-07-24: +20 (2802→2822) for the H3 decision-log privacy fix — resync gate (clean-check + push stamp) and contentShaForDecisionPush (hashes the redacted body so brain dedupe overwrites leaked rows). Irreducible security logic kept in aios.mjs to avoid pulling node:crypto into the operator-loop bundle; FOLLOW-UP: extract the decision sync-state helpers to a dedicated module and ratchet this back.
